ogTitle: Caboolture vs Caboolture South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caboolture and Caboolture South.
heading: Caboolture vs Caboolture South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caboolture, Queensland and Caboolture South, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caboolture has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Caboolture South (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caboolture or Caboolture South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caboolture has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Caboolture South scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caboolture scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Caboolture South scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caboolture or Caboolture South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caboolture has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
